overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt walking along a forest trail at night. The character stops briefly to survey the surroundings before continuing down the winding dirt path through dense woodland.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding dirt path through dense forest, two swords visible on back

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail with small rocks and patches of grass
tall dark pine trees forming dense forest canopy
tall dark pine trees forming dense forest canopy
tall green grass lining both sides of the path
tall green grass lining both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks steadily along a narrow dirt trail through a dense forest at night. The path winds ahead between tall pine trees and thick grass verges, with limited visibility due to the darkness and enclosing vegetation.

events.description: Geralt stops walking and stands still on the path
camera begins orbiting around Geralt to survey the surroundings from multiple angles

agents.ego_description: stands still and looks around cautiously, surveying the forest surroundings while the camera completes a 360-degree orbit

segments.scene_description: Geralt stops on the path and stands alert while the camera orbits around him, revealing the dense forest from all angles. The dirt path and surrounding trees shift in perspective as the camera moves, showing the enclosed nature of the woodland environment.

events.description: Geralt resumes walking forward along the forest path

agents.ego_description: continues walking along the winding path, moving deeper into the forest with steady pace

segments.scene_description: Geralt resumes his journey along the forest trail, walking away from the spot where he stopped. The path continues winding through the dense pine forest, with atmospheric mist occasionally visible among the trees as he progresses deeper into the woodland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, nocturnal forest as a traveler navigates a winding dirt trail. It begins with the camera trailing behind Geralt as he walks steadily along a narrow path enclosed by tall pine trees and thick grass under the cover of darkness. As he comes to a halt, the camera orbits around him in a smooth arc, shifting perspective to reveal the oppressive density of the surrounding woodland from all angles. The scene then transitions back into forward motion as Geralt resumes his journey, moving away from the clearing and deeper into the forest. Finally, the path continues to wind through the pines, with atmospheric mist beginning to drift between the trees as he progresses further into the gloom.
